title: Gluten-Free Date Crumble
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert made with dates, perfect for a gluten-free treat. This crumble is easy to make and requires minimal ingredients.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together dates, sweet, and crunchy.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
In another bowl, mix together italian (or gluten-free oat topping).
Spread the italian mixture evenly over the date mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
